steps.title: Read the signs from the graph
steps.content: The line of best fit rises from left to right, so its slope is positive. It crosses the $y$-axis just above $0$, so its $y$-intercept is positive.

steps.title: Estimate the slope
steps.content:
Two readable points on the line are about $(2,4.2)$ and $(5,9)$. The slope is approximately
$$\frac{9-4.2}{5-2}=\frac{4.8}{3}=1.6$$
A slope near $1.7$ and a positive intercept near $0.8$ fit the graph. The answer is A.
